free_text: reactions on natural erbium for the production of
Erbium targets of natural isotopic composition were
used. Mechanically stable and visually homogeneous
samples with a thickness of 5-11 mg/cm2 were
obtained. The spot diameter was 20 mm. The target was
covered with ~9 mu-m aluminum foil. Three stacks of
foils were prepared, each consisted of ten erbium
targets and aluminum degraders with a thickness of
Gamma spectrometer with an ORTEC GEM 35P4 high
purity germanium detector with energy resolution 850 eV
for the 122 keV line and 1.8 keV for the 1330 keV
The irradiation time was ~ 0.5 h at a beam
Entry was approved by Dr. E.S. Kormazeva
The uncertainties of the cross sections were
determined by taking the sum in quadrature of all
